slots.caption_ig:
Every craving. A verdict. The #1 dish in every cuisine — ranked for your block. Italian, Japanese, Indian, Mexican, soul food, dim sum. We've scored all of it.

#ForkFox #FoodRanked #DishNotRestaurant #FoodSmart #PhillyEats
slots.caption_fb: Every cuisine has a verdict near you. Italian, Mexican, Japanese, Indian, Vietnamese, soul food, dim sum, BBQ. Pick a craving, see the #1 dish in that category, ranked for your neighborhood. No more cycling between five review apps.
slots.video_gen_prompt: Vertical 9:16 video, 8 seconds. A grid of cuisine icons (pasta, ramen, biryani, taco, pho). Camera zooms into each one and shows the #1 dish photo. End frame: 'Every craving. A verdict.' with 'verdict' in red.
